title: All the Useless Advice I Got

story.opening: <break time="500ms"/>You know what I heard the most during my insomnia? <break time="400ms"/>'Just relax.'
story.body: <break time="450ms"/>People meant well. <break time="400ms"/>But the advice was endless - <break time="350ms"/>and useless. <break time="600ms"/>'Have you tried melatonin?' <break time="500ms"/>Yes. <break time="400ms"/>'What about no screens before bed?' <break time="350ms"/>Yes. <break time="300ms"/>'Warm milk?' <break time="250ms"/>Yes. <break time="200ms"/>'Exercise more?' <break time="150ms"/>Yes. <break time="100ms"/>'Exercise less?' <break time="600ms"/>The worst was: 'You must be doing something wrong.' <break time="500ms"/>As if insomnia was a character flaw. <break time="400ms"/>As if I wasn't trying hard enough. <break time="600ms"/>My own doctor told me to 'stop thinking about it.' <break time="500ms"/>I wanted to scream.
story.reflection: <break time="600ms"/>So I won't give you that advice. <break time="500ms"/>I know you've heard it all. <break time="400ms"/>I know you've tried. <break time="350ms"/>I know you're not doing anything wrong. <break time="600ms"/>Sometimes bodies just don't cooperate. <break time="500ms"/>That's not your fault. <break time="400ms"/>It was never your fault.

when_to_share: When someone expresses frustration at unhelpful advice or feeling dismissed
